legal.disclaimer_body: Loklii is a technology platform that connects independent service providers with customers. Loklii does not prepare, inspect, or guarantee any food, service, or product offered on this platform. Loklii is not responsible for food quality, safety, injuries, allergic reactions, or compliance with local health department regulations. Each host is an independent provider responsible for complying with all applicable local, state, and federal laws, including food handler certifications and permits. By creating an account, you acknowledge that Loklii shall not be liable to the fullest extent permitted by law for any claims arising from services booked through this platform.
legal.agree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Health & Safety Disclaimer.
legal.must_agree: You must agree to the terms to create an account.
